content:
{
  "artifact_type": "lovable_build_prompt",
  "depth_tier": "D2_PRODUCTION",
  "runtime_target": "Codex",
  "should_block": false,
  "blocked_reason": null,
  "compiled_intent": {
    "Objective": "Generate a lovable_build_prompt for compliance_evidence using the sovereign_lens, enabling enterprise compliance leads in Latin America to produce governed artifacts with explicit validation gates, despite high-urgency, low-context, and chaotic input.",
    "Scope": "The prompt must accept messy, partial, urgent, and ambiguous compliance evidence inputs from Latin American enterprise contexts, and output a structured, SR8-compilable artifact with objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract sections. It must include explicit validation gates for completeness, regulatory alignment, and sovereign compliance.",
    "Constraints": [
      "Input may be high urgency with missing context, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria.",
      "Output must be a governed artifact suitable for SR8 compilation.",
      "Must use sovereign_lens principles: data sovereignty, local regulatory compliance (e.g., LGPD, GDPR alignment), and auditability.",
      "Validation gates must be explicit and enforceable.",
      "No hallucinated or fabricated compliance evidence; all outputs must be traceable to provided input."
    ],
    "Success Criteria": [
      "The generated prompt produces an artifact with all five SR8 sections: Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract.",
      "Artifact includes at least three explicit validation gates (e.g., completeness check, regulatory check, sovereign check).",
      "Artifact is usable by a compliance lead in Latin America with minimal additional context.",
      "Artifact compiles without error into an SR8 directive."
    ],
    "Output Contract": {
      "format": "JSON with keys: artifact_type, depth_tier, runtime_target, should_block, blocked_reason, compiled_intent",
      "compiled_intent": {
        "Objective": "string",
        "Scope": "string",
        "Constraints": "array of strings",
        "Success Criteria": "array of strings",
        "Output Contract": "object with format and required fields"
      },
      "validation_gates": [
        "gate_1: completeness_check - verify all input fields are present or flagged as missing",
        "gate_2: regulatory_check - confirm artifact references applicable Latin American regulations",
        "gate_3: sovereign_check - ensure data sovereignty and local processing requirements are met"
      ]
    }
  }
}
